name: Duplicate Code Detection
description: Cross-package clone/duplicate detection via clone-detect.mjs (tree-sitter). The host runs the scan and persists results to <repo>/.code-workbench/duplicates-findings.json; the cw-ast MCP tool find_duplicates reads that file and applies acks + post-filters at read time. Surfaced as cw-ast MCP tools and the VS Code extension's full editor-tab Duplicates page (scanPages.ts, replacing the old sidebar DuplicatesView) rendering the shared @code-workbench/ui DuplicatesPanel — on the page each clone member carries a host-widened `snippet` and the panel renders group members SIDE BY SIDE for comparison (falls back to the compact list when snippets are absent).
guidelines: groupFingerprint lives in scan-runner.cjs — import from there; do not redefine it
groupFingerprint hashes members' deduplicated normHash, not line positions — acks survive edits elsewhere in the file
clone-detect.mjs emits normHash per member; consumers strip it from public output after fingerprinting
Scan execution, ack, exclude, and findings persistence delegate to shared-scan-service; the extension host keeps only path/binary resolution
Host scan callsites pass persistTo: repoPath so the Rescan button is the canonical entry point that produces the findings file the MCP tool reads
Directory exclusion is basename-match; --exclude-dirs comma-list passed to clone-detect CLI
The pane UI is the shared ui DuplicatesPanel/ScanPanel — the extension wraps it with its own ScanPaneApi adapter
ast-core.mjs resolves tree-sitter wasm relative to the bundled detector — esbuild.mjs must copy grammar + web-tree-sitter wasm into dist/mcp-server/grammars/ or the extension scan silently returns []
ast-core.locateFile checks WEB_TREE_SITTER_DIR, GRAMMARS_DIR, then the detector dir — covers both source-tree and bundled .vsix layouts

find_duplicates MCP tool reads findings + applies acks at read time, then post-filters by min_lines/similarity/include_structural/langs/limit over the persisted set. Response includes generatedAt + stale (>24h). force_scan: true is the explicit inline-scan escape hatch.
anti_patterns: Redefine groupFingerprint outside scan-runner.cjs — causes ack-list divergence
Make a fingerprint depend on line numbers
Leak normHash into the public DuplicateGroup.members shape
Inline readJsonArray/writeJsonArray in host code — use scan-state/findings-store instead
Re-implement the scan panel UI — use the shared ui ScanPanel
Ship a JS-only bundle of clone-detect without its tree-sitter wasm assets — getParser() returns null and the scan silently finds nothing
Make find_duplicates run a fresh inline detectClones on every call — it should read the persisted findings; force_scan: true is the explicit opt-in
decisions: Group identity is content-based: hash of members' deduplicated normHash, not line positions
Tree-sitter grammar + runtime wasm are copied into dist/mcp-server/grammars/ by esbuild.mjs so the packaged extension's duplicate scan works for any project

Host-writes / MCP-reads: find_duplicates reads <repo>/.code-workbench/duplicates-findings.json by default. Filters are post-filters over the persisted set so toggling them does not require a rescan. force_scan: true preserves the legacy inline-scan path.
